You wake up at 3am drenched in sweat.

The brain fog makes you feel like you are losing your mind — forgetting words, losing trains of thought, second-guessing yourself in ways you never did before.

The weight shift is happening without explanation. The exhaustion is real, even after a full night of sleep. And somewhere underneath all of it, there is a quieter feeling: that your body has become a stranger.

You have searched. You have bookmarked. You have tried things. But the information is contradictory, the supplements are expensive, and no one seems to have a clear answer that actually fits your life.

This is not a malfunction. This is a transition — one that your body is designed to move through. And the tools to navigate it have existed for centuries.

Why Flora & Thrive exists

There is a different way to go through this.

What you were probably offered

  • —A prescription to suppress the symptoms
  • —A 15-minute appointment with more questions than answers
  • —Supplements with no protocol and no way to know if they're working
  • —Being told this is "just part of getting older"
  • —Conflicting information that leaves you more confused

What your body actually needs

  • ✦To be understood — not suppressed
  • ✦Plant-based tools that work with your hormones, not against them
  • ✦A system that shows you what actually works in YOUR body
  • ✦To be seen as a woman in transition — not a patient with a disorder
  • ✦One clear, organized starting point — built on real science

Flora & Thrive exists because too many women spend months — sometimes years — searching at 2am, trying things that don't work, feeling alone in a body that feels unfamiliar. Going from one supplement to another. Reading conflicting studies. Wondering if anything will ever stick.

You don't have to keep searching. This system is built so you can stop researching and start applying. One clear protocol, organized by symptom, with tracking built in so you know exactly what's working in your body.

Your energy belongs in your healing — not in the search.

We are not here to replace your doctor. We are here to give you what a 15-minute appointment never could — a complete, evidence-informed natural system that you control, that you track, and that you adjust based on what your own body shows you.

Because real health is not the absence of symptoms.
It is understanding what your body is saying
— and knowing how to answer.

The wisdom your great-grandmother carried in her hands.

For thousands of years, women knew. They knew which plant reduced the fever. Which root calmed the nervous system. Which herb helped a woman sleep through the night when her hormones were shifting. They passed this knowledge from mother to daughter, from healer to apprentice, from generation to generation.

This wisdom was not mystical. It was practical, precise, and deeply scientific — it just predated the clinical trials that would eventually prove it right.

Somewhere along the way, we were told to stop trusting it. To see our bodies as problems to be managed, not systems to be understood.

"Flora & Thrive exists not because we invented something new —
but because we went back to what women always knew."

We organized it, verified it against modern research, and made it accessible to you.

The Menopause Relief Toolkit is not a product. It is a return.

You are not looking for someone to fix you.

You are looking for a map.

Your body is already doing the work — adjusting, adapting, recalibrating. What it needs is not more intervention. It needs support. The right herbs at the right doses. The right foods that reduce inflammation instead of feeding it. A way to track what is actually happening so you can adjust, not guess.

"The woman who knows her own body.
The woman who knows which plants to reach for.
The woman who tracks her own patterns and adjusts.
The alchemist of her own health."

That is what this toolkit gives you. Not a cure. Not a miracle. A system.

Everything inside the Toolkit

Five files. Instant download. Yours forever.

01 of 05

The Natural Menopause Guide

25 pages · PDF · The foundation

A complete, evidence-informed guide that explains what is actually happening in your body — not in medical jargon, but in language that makes you feel informed, not overwhelmed.

  • 8 main symptoms explained with the physiology behind each one
  • Complete herb-by-symptom protocol — 10 clinically studied herbs with exact doses
  • Anti-inflammatory food guide — 20 foods that help, 7 that worsen symptoms
  • 21-day natural habit plan — progressive, not overwhelming

02 of 05

12-Month Symptom Tracker

Google Sheets · Track daily in 3 minutes

This is where the real transformation happens. After 2–3 weeks of daily tracking, patterns emerge that you cannot see any other way.

  • 25 symptoms tracked daily on a 0–5 scale
  • Automatic dashboard — monthly severity score and trend charts
  • 12 months of tracking in one file
  • Notes column for triggers, herbs, and habits

03 of 05

21-Day Lifestyle Companion

40 pages · PDF · Movement · Recipes · Wellbeing

Knowledge without action stays on the page. This companion is built for real life — no gym membership, no complicated meal plan.

  • 21-day gentle movement plan — day by day, no equipment required
  • 10 quick anti-inflammatory recipes — 15 minutes or less
  • Joy and Recreation Guide — pleasurable activities as part of the protocol
  • Sleep Optimization Checklist + hot flash protocol for 3am

04 of 05

Herb Quick Reference Card

Printable · 1 page · Put it on your fridge

Your great-grandmother had this knowledge in her memory. You get it on a single printable page.

  • 10 herbs with symptoms, doses, formats, and safety notes
  • Walk into any health store knowing exactly what you need
  • Print it. Put it on your fridge. Use it every week.

05 of 05

Anti-Inflammatory Shopping List

Printable · 1 page · Use it this week

The fastest way to start is at the supermarket.

  • 13 supplements organized with checkboxes
  • 20 hormone-friendly foods — ready to buy this week
  • Start building the anti-inflammatory diet that makes everything else work better

Is this for you?

You are not a patient with a problem to suppress.
You are a woman with a body designed to adapt —
and you deserve tools that treat you that way.

This is for you if:

  • You are between 38 and 62 experiencing perimenopause or menopause symptoms
  • You believe your body has more intelligence than any single symptom suggests
  • You are done with conflicting information and want one organized system
  • You are willing to track and give natural methods the weeks they need
  • You want to understand your body, not just suppress what you feel

This is not for you if:

  • You are looking for overnight results — natural methods take 2–6 weeks of consistency
  • You need emergency medical care — please see a doctor first
  • You are not willing to spend 3 minutes per day tracking your symptoms

What the research shows

The science behind the system.

Every protocol in this toolkit is built on published clinical research — not trends, not anecdotes.

52%

Reduction in hot flash frequency

Slow diaphragmatic breathing practiced consistently reduced hot flash frequency by up to 52% in clinical studies.

Freedman & Woodward, Obstetrics & Gynecology

73%

Of women report improvement with Black Cohosh

Multiple randomized controlled trials show significant reduction in vasomotor symptoms with consistent Black Cohosh use over 8–12 weeks.

Menopause: The Journal of The Menopause Society

2×

Better outcomes with symptom tracking

Women who tracked symptoms consistently were twice as likely to identify their personal triggers and adjust their protocol effectively.

Journal of Women's Health, 2021

40%

Reduction in inflammation markers

An anti-inflammatory diet rich in omega-3s, phytoestrogens, and polyphenols reduced inflammatory markers by up to 40% in perimenopausal women.

Nutrients Journal, 2020

8wks

Average time to see results with natural protocols

Natural interventions require consistency. Most studies show measurable improvement in vasomotor symptoms after 6–12 weeks of consistent application.

Climacteric: Journal of Menopause

80%

Of women experience vasomotor symptoms

Up to 80% of women going through menopause experience hot flashes or night sweats — yet fewer than 25% receive structured guidance on managing them naturally.

North American Menopause Society

For educational purposes only. These statistics reflect published research findings and may not apply to every individual. Consult your healthcare provider.
